business_context: The agent is an echo agent. It returns whatever it receives. If a file is uploaded, it returns the filepath and size.

scenarios.scenario: The user sends a greeting message
scenarios.expected_outcome: The agent returns the same message with an echo at the beginning

scenarios.scenario: The user uploades the file "/Users/yuval/work/junk/videos/The Hardest Problem AI Ever Solved, with Google DeepMind CEO [C0gErQtnNFE].mp4"
scenarios.expected_outcome: The agent confirms that the file was uplaoded and states the size.
